english_text: We had so much fun back then
I will never forget that moment
I wish we could go back
I think about the past sometimes
That song reminds me of you
I get sentimental on rainy days
We used to go there all the time
I found an old photo album
I cannot believe it has been ten years
We had the best summer that year
I grew up in a small town
I get emotional thinking about it
We promised to stay in touch
The four seasons bring different memories
We made so many memories there
I want to visit that place again
Our friendship lasted through the years
I keep a diary to remember
The past shaped who I am
I cherish every memory we made
korean_text: 우리가 만든 모든 추억을 소중히 여겨
romanization: uriga mandeun modeun chueoegeul sojunghi yeogyeo

english_text: I wish I took more photos
I want to create more memories
Those days will always be in my heart
korean_text: 그 시절은 항상 내 마음속에 있을 거야
romanization: geu sijeoreun hangsang nae maeumsoge isseul geoya

english_text: Let us make new memories together
